title: Container worker execution profile
objective: Add L1_CONTAINER_WORKER support as an optional execution profile for stronger process and dependency isolation than local worktree execution.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Define L1_CONTAINER_WORKER in generated execution-profiles.yml with explicit mount, user, network, and secret behavior.
Generate container worker templates such as Dockerfile.worker or compose.worker.yml if enabled.
Implement a runner path that can prepare a bind-mounted worktree and collect artifacts after container exit, or document the skeleton if Docker is not available in tests.
Enforce no direct production secrets and no Docker socket inside worker by default.
Add dry-run tests that validate generated config without requiring Docker in CI.

expectedArtifacts: tests or fixtures when behavior changes
updated documentation if user-facing behavior changes
koObjective: L1 컨테이너 worker 실행 profile을 만든다.

koGuide.요약: 이 작업은 Codex가 Dev Container 안에서 자동 구현할 수 있도록 설계된 단계별 task packet입니다.
